cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. The question is about figuring out the possible times Andrew could have gone to the coffee shop. The coffee shop closes after 8pm. Let me go through the information step by step. First, Andrew woke up at 8am. So he's awake starting at 8am. The coffee shop is closed after 8pm, so he must have gone between 8am and 8pm. Now, we have several people who saw Andrew doing different activities at different times. Let's list those out: 1. Elizabeth saw Andrew fixing their computer at the electronic store from 11am to 3pm. 2. Jennifer saw him buying a bike at the bike shop from 3pm to 4pm. 3. Anthony saw him buying cookies at a bakery from 4pm to 6pm. 4. Betty saw him watching a movie at the theater from 6pm to 8pm. So during those periods, Andrew was occupied with these activities. That means he couldn't have been at the coffee shop during those times. Therefore, the times when he was busy are 11am-3pm, 3pm-4pm, 4pm-6pm, and 6pm-8pm. The times not covered by these activities are between when he woke up at 8am until 11am. Because from 8am to 11am, there's no mention of him doing anything else. After that, he was seen doing other things until 8pm when the coffee shop closes. So the possible window for Andrew to go to the coffee shop would be between 8am and 11am.
